meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Learn about Roofpro — 25+ years of durable, reliable roofing, a team of licensed professionals, and the values that drive every project we deliver.

header.description: Roofpro was built on a simple promise: honest, high-quality roofing that lasts. A quarter-century later, that promise still guides every inspection, quote and installation.

items.title: Quality Craftsmanship
items.description: Premium materials and meticulous workmanship on every job — no shortcuts, ever.

items.title: Safety First
items.description: Certified, insured crews that follow strict safety standards to protect your property and our team.

items.title: Honest & Transparent
items.description: Upfront, itemised pricing and straight answers — you always know exactly what you're getting.

items.title: Community Focused
items.description: We're proud to protect the homes and businesses of the neighbourhoods we live and work in.
